title: Add retry utility to async-helpers.ts
description: Create `retry<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>, maxAttempts: number, delayMs: number): Promise<T>` in `src/utils/async-helpers.ts` with exponential backoff. The function should retry failed operations up to maxAttempts times with delayMs as the base delay, doubling each retry (exponential backoff). Include comprehensive tests in `src/utils/async-helpers.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/utils/retry.ts - existing retry with exponential backoff using RetryOptions object pattern (different API signature, but same backoff algorithm)
src/utils/promise-pool.ts - PromisePool class with progress tracking pattern for async utilities
src/utils/*.test.ts - co-located test files using vitest with fake timers for async testing
